Dashboard brief:
Domain: Energy Consumption
Available data fields: date, meter_id, kwh_used, renewable_kwh, peak_demand
Key metrics to track: Carbon Emissions, Total Energy Usage (kWh), Energy Intensity
User goals: track renewable share, monitor total energy usage, reduce carbon emissions
<|assistant|>
{
  "context_summary": "This Energy Consumption dashboard is designed to help users track renewable share and monitor total energy usage. It focuses on Carbon Emissions, Total Energy Usage (kWh), Energy Intensity using data from fields such as date, meter_id, kwh_used.",
  "kpi_task_chart_mapping": [
    {
      "kpi": "Carbon Emissions",
      "user_task": "detailed records",
      "recommended_chart": "table",
      "rationale": "Bar charts allow quick comparison across discrete categories."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Total Energy Usage (kWh)",
      "user_task": "trend over time",
      "recommended_chart": "line chart",
      "rationale": "Tables support detailed record inspection and sorting."
    },
    {
      "kpi": "Energy Intensity",
      "user_task": "composition/share",
      "recommended_chart": "stacked bar chart or donut chart",
      "rationale": "Line charts effectively communicate trends over continuous time periods."
    }
  ],
  "layout_hierarchy": "Left panel: KPI cards (vertical). Right panel: main chart on top, detail table below.",
  "labels_scales_colors": "Blue-green palette for positive trends; red for negative deviations. Clear axis labels with units.",
  "interactions": [
    "Date range filter",
    "Cross-filter between charts",
    "Zoom on time axis"
  ],
  "design_rationales": [
    "Tables support detailed record inspection and sorting.",
    "Heatmaps reveal patterns across two dimensions simultaneously."
  ]
}
